case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. CURRY UP NOW

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,291.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT CURRY UP NOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT CURRY UP NOW

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO MAY-21-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE AT TODAY'S HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH SPOLN--INVESTIGATOR.DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY AMIR HOSSEINI. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CURRY UP NOW

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY AMIR HOSSEINI-MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
